title: Noumenal repo manifest (noumenal.json)
description: Place this file at the root of a repo to opt it into the Noumenal site. The aggregator (cron + manual) reads it, validates each witness, pulls live proof code for PUBLIC repos, and regenerates the cards.

noumenal.description: Opt-in flag. Must be true or the repo is ignored.

order.description: global ordering hint within its section

repo.description: display string shown on the card (e.g. 'design-lab · causality')

alsoIn.description: other ingredients this project also appears in

direction.description: the research direction (one paragraph, standard vocabulary)

tbd.description: true => rendered as a pending card with no witnesses

source.description: human-readable provenance shown under the witness

code.description: proof: the Lean snippet (fallback / private repos)

file.description: proof: real in-repo path to the .lean (PUBLIC repos get this pulled live and validated)

name.description: proof: the declaration name to pull/validate

src.description: figure: image URL or data URI
